title: SRE Affordance — Canonical Source
description: An action an entity makes possible for a given actor. Affordances answer 'What can you do with X?' not 'What is X?'

entity_id.description: The entity that affords the action.

action.description: The action entity_id that this entity makes possible.

description.description: Natural language description of the affordance (e.g., 'Dog affords being walked on a leash').

typical_actors.description: Entity types that typically realize this affordance.

typical_outcome.description: Expected outcomes (STATE, EMOTION, or EVENT entity_ids).

equipment.description: Tools or other entities typically required.

cultural.description: Whether this affordance is culturally specific.

cultural_notes.description: Required if cultural is true. Explains the cultural context.
